An Appreciation of The Book of Mormon

Elder Leland H. Monson

[Address Delivered at the Annual General Relief Society Conference, October 3, 1951]

We live in a day when the concept of a divine Christ has been weakened in the minds and hearts of men and women. The utterances of Dr. Percy Stickney Grant show the strength of this movement: Ch
article_title: An Appreciation of The Book of Mormon
notes: Found the beginning of the article in the Misc file ending with 'Ch' which connects to 'rist was a wonderful man' in Art 1 to form 'Christ was a wonderful man'. Clear mid-sentence break.
